programmes.show_description: 1903, and a survivor from the Boer War lands in colonial New Zealand where he is promised a huge bounty to capture a Maori accused of killing a Britsih soldier. Stars Ray Winstone (2011).
(1963) War drama starring Victor French and Majel Barrett. With the aid of local partisans, a group of American soldiers try to make it through enemy-occupied Italy to safety.
A customer changes her clothes in full sight of her fellow passengers, the police are called to assist with a group of drunk women, and in Chicago, it is 70's day at the airport.
A group of women head to the airport bar ahead of their trip to Las Vegas for a bachelorette party, and airline staff are excited in anticipation for the company's Southwest Spirit party.
In Los Angeles, a swarm of dangerous bees have set up a hive at Gate 13, and a customer supervisor is excited to learn that a royal passenger will be travelling through LAX.
Flight attendant Heather Hale is shocked when her boyfriend asks her an important question, and a student attempts to get to New York to see his girlfriend.

At her father's funeral, Allison meets her birth mother who has a plan to stop her from inheriting $40-million. Starring Karen Cliché (2017)
A mother to be realises that the woman who moves in next door is not being truthful, and that once the baby is born it will be in danger. Starring Anna Van Hooft (2017)
(2018) Thriller with Ashleigh Dorrell. Amy begins her first night shift at a hotel. But this is a place with a dark past, and sometimes history repeats itself... Will she survive the graveyard shift?
(2015) Tense drama with Lynn Collins. After a whirlwind wedding, a single mother finds herself committed to an institution when her husband plans to take everything she has - including her daughter.
A woman vouches for her ex-husband after he seemingly kills his new wife in self-defence but after he is let off the hook, she discovers his elaborate ploy. Starring Marguerite Moreau (2017)
(2020) Thriller starring Julie McNiven. A grieving couple donates their dead daughter's organs. But the recipient of her heart exhibits a disturbing and sinister obsession.
(2020) Thriller starring Lindsay Hartley. Two families are thrown into crisis when they discover their daughters were switched at birth - but nothing will stop one mother keeping what's hers...
(2002) Supernatural horror with Kate Bosworth and Justin Long. A man accompanies a mysterious woman to her secluded estate, but shadowy figures make it clear he isn't welcome.

programmes.show_name: Jack Hunter And The Lost Treasure Of Uga
programmes.show_description: An adventuring archaeologist navigates danger and conspiracy to try and find the fabled treasure of the Ugarit. Starring Ivan Sergei (2008).
(2010) Martial arts action with Josh Hartnett and Woody Harrelson. A mysterious drifter, a bartender and a young samurai join up against a ruthless leader and deadly assassins.
(1960) Western with James Craig. A former gunslinger tries to restore order to a lawless town, but is foiled by the efforts of an evil saloon owner whose infirmity grants him immunity from violence.
(1966) Western starring Jack Nicholson. Mistaken for outlaws, three cowboys find themselves on the run from a relentless posse hungry for justice.
The airline's customer service team face the challenge of getting passengers to Florida when the flight they are booked onto is oversold.
A daughter is embarrassed by her angry father, a grandmother is not allowed to travel with her oxygen canisters, and a delighted couple return home after adopting their baby daughter.
A bride-to-be is refused permission to fly for being too drunk, two Southwest pilots elope to Las Vegas to get married, and a bridal gown fails to make it home in one piece.
A blizzard threatens to ruin a newlywed couple's honeymoon, and a customer service supervisor tries to defuse a heated argument between two passengers at check-in.
A passenger faces the prospect of missing his son's operation after missing his flight, and an electrical failure causes a blackout onboard a grounded plane.

A former police detective takes on the local mob to avenge his estranged son's death. Stars Steven Seagal, Johnny Messner, DMX (2019)
A CIA agent has to stop Islamic terrorists from teaming up with Mexican cartels to smuggle weapons of mass destruction into the U.S.
